session.user:
Run ruff check and ruff format check on the two modified files and report results. Do not fix anything.
Commands: 1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check and ruff format check on the two modified files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linting check on modified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on modified files

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed on both files
ruff format check passed: Both files are already properly formatted
Summary: - **Linting**: 0 violations found - **Formatting**: Both files conform to Prettier code style - Files checked: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/land_learn.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py`
